name: Rich Expresso Brownie Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Pecans, coarsely chopped and toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a heatproof bowl, melt chocolate and shortening over low heat until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in eggs, egg yolk, and brown sugar until well combined.
5. Mix in flour and baking powder.
6. Stir in chopped pecans.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
10. Turn off the oven.
